scripts.package: npm run build && electron-packager . mini --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --overwrite --out=dist --app-bundle-id=com.mini.app --app-version=0.2.1 --icon=build/icon.icns && scripts/sign-mac.sh dist/mini-darwin-arm64 dist/mini-0.2.1-arm64.zip
scripts.package:intel: npm run build && electron-packager . mini --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --overwrite --out=dist --app-bundle-id=com.mini.app --app-version=0.2.1 --icon=build/icon.icns && scripts/sign-mac.sh dist/mini-darwin-x64 dist/mini-0.2.1-x64.zip
scripts.package:universal: npm run build && electron-packager . mini --platform=darwin --arch=universal --overwrite --out=dist --app-bundle-id=com.mini.app --app-version=0.2.1 --icon=build/icon.icns && scripts/sign-mac.sh dist/mini-darwin-universal dist/mini-0.2.1-universal.zip
